key_findings.delivery_impact: Late delivery rate spiked in Nov-2017 (Black Friday), leading to growth stagnation.
key_findings.seller_bottleneck: Seller preparation time accounts for a significant portion of delays during high-volume months.
key_findings.freight_efficiency: SP state enjoys the lowest freight costs (18-19 BRL), while outer regions face higher barriers.
key_findings.customer_sentiment: Negative reviews are primarily driven by low product quality and shipping delays.
key_findings.logistics_strategy: Transitioning to 3PL (Third-Party Logistics) outside SP is recommended to scale volume.
